subcodes.first_line: Grief and joy, poverty and wealth, hardship and ease, adversity and comfort—all lie within the grasp of His power and ever have been thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حزن و سرور و فقر و غنا و شدت و رخا و عسر و یسر کل در قبضهٴ قدرت او بوده و هست
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
